title: StructureBreak
description: A BOS or CHoCh structure break event emitted by SMC engine v2.

kind.description: The break type. BOS = continuation, CHOCH = reversal. _BULL/_BEAR indicates direction.

time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the bar where the break was detected (close-based).

bar_index.description: Position of the break bar within the input series.

break_price.description: Close price at break_index, the price that crossed anchor_swing_price.

anchor_swing_time.description: Timestamp of the swing point that was broken.

anchor_swing_bar_index.description: Position of the broken swing within the input series.

anchor_swing_price.description: Price level (high or low) of the broken swing.

trend_after.description: Market trend state after this event was processed. CHOCH events flip the trend; BOS events leave it unchanged. Initial BOS from neutral sets trend to its direction.
